title: crypto anomaly panel - 24h unresolved
description: Add a backend API and minimal wiring to expose unresolved crypto anomalies in the last 24 hours with severity >= 0.5 for a watchlist.
goal: Expose unresolved crypto anomalies (last 24h, severity>=0.5) in watchlist panel
in_scope: backend: query anomalies store and implement filter unresolved anomalies in last 24h with severity >= 0.5
api: new endpoint GET /api/watchlist/:id/anomalies that returns structured JSON
tests: unit + integration for endpoint, anomaly dedup logic and sample fixtures
rationale: add rationale.md mapping acceptance criteria to evidence
out_of_scope: frontend styling beyond a basic table or wireframe

subtasks.title: backend: anomalies API
subtasks.description: Implement a service function to query anomaly store, filter unresolved anomalies within the last 24 hours and with severity >= 0.5, deduplicate occurrences within 1 hour, and expose a GET /api/watchlist/:id/anomalies endpoint returning { assets, anomalies, last_updated }.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/watchlist/{id}/anomalies returns 200 and JSON with keys ["assets","anomalies","last_updated"] when called with valid demo token
anomaly deduplication: two identical anomalies within 30 minutes produce a single anomaly record with occurrences>=2
anomaly record for synthetic spike has type="price_spike" and severity >= 0.5
rationale.md present and maps each acceptance criterion to pass/fail evidence

risks.explanation: Depends on anomaly_store availability and data contract for anomaly records
